# Parallel Concepts

## Concept A — Public inspection first

Guests enter a public catalog, choose an item, inspect detail, and recover from load failure without creating an account.

## Concept B — Account library first

Returning members enter a private library. This increases setup and privacy scope, so it is not the MVP direction.

## Concept C — Shared link first

Guests land directly on a shared item. This is retained as an entry point but not the primary home model.

## Comparison And Recommendation

Concept A wins on clarity, feasibility, and trust. Concept C is preserved as a secondary entry path. Concept B moves to P1.

## Direction Lock

The user confirmed Concept A with the shared-link entry path retained.
